<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Solutions\SolutionProviders; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\SolutionProviders\Laravel\UnknownMysql8CollationSolutionProvider as BaseUnknownMysql8CollationSolutionProviderAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\HasSolutionsForThrowable; class UnknownMysql8CollationSolutionProvider extends BaseUnknownMysql8CollationSolutionProviderAlias implements HasSolutionsForThrowable { }
